mapper.sql: select order_id, order_no, goods_id, buyer_id, seller_id, goods_title, goods_images, trade_method, trade_price, trade_place, appointment_time, order_status, payment_status, refund_status, refund_amount, refund_reason, refund_apply_time, refund_time, alipay_refund_no, buyer_remark, seller_remark, cancel_reason, confirm_time, pay_time, alipay_trade_no, payment_amount, payment_time, complete_time, cancel_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark from tr_trade_order

select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.goods_title, o.goods_images, o.trade_method, o.trade_price, o.trade_place, o.appointment_time, o.order_status, o.payment_status, o.refund_status, o.refund_amount, o.refund_reason, o.refund_apply_time, o.refund_time, o.alipay_refund_no, o.buyer_remark, o.seller_remark, o.cancel_reason, o.confirm_time, o.pay_time, o.alipay_trade_no, o.payment_amount, o.payment_time, o.complete_time, o.cancel_time, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.del_flag, o.remark, s.nickname as seller_nickname, s.avatar as seller_avatar, b.nickname as buyer_nickname, b.avatar as buyer_avatar from tr_trade_order o left join tr_student_user s on s.user_id = o.seller_id and s.del_flag = '0' left join tr_student_user b on b.user_id = o.buyer_id and b.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into tr_trade_order
order_no, goods_id, buyer_id, seller_id, goods_title, goods_images, trade_method, trade_price, trade_place, appointment_time, order_status, payment_status, refund_status, refund_amount, refund_reason, refund_apply_time, refund_time, alipay_refund_no, buyer_remark, seller_remark, cancel_reason, confirm_time, pay_time, alipay_trade_no, payment_amount, payment_time, complete_time, cancel_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark,
#{orderNo}, #{goodsId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{goodsTitle}, #{goodsImages}, #{tradeMethod}, #{tradePrice}, #{tradePlace}, #{appointmentTime}, #{orderStatus}, #{paymentStatus}, #{refundStatus}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundReason}, #{refundApplyTime}, #{refundTime}, #{alipayRefundNo}, #{buyerRemark}, #{sellerRemark}, #{cancelReason}, #{confirmTime}, #{payTime}, #{alipayTradeNo}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentTime}, #{completeTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark},
mapper.select: select count(1) from tr_trade_order where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0' and order_status in ('0', '2', '5', '6')
mapper.update: update tr_trade_order set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId}

update tr_trade_order set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where order_id in
#{orderId}
mapper.select: select order_id from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and order_status = '0' and (payment_status is null or payment_status not in ('1', '2')) and create_time < #{before}
select order_id from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and order_status = '2' and (refund_status is null or refund_status = '0') and payment_time is not null and payment_time < #{before}
select count(1) from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and create_time >= curdate() and create_time < curdate() + interval 1 day
select count(1) from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and order_status = '3'
select coalesce(sum(coalesce(payment_amount, trade_price)), 0) from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and order_status = '3'

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, count(1) as totalCount from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and create_time >= #{startDate} and create_time < #{endDate} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d')

select date_format(complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, count(1) as totalCount from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and order_status = '3' and complete_time is not null and complete_time >= #{startDate} and complete_time < #{endDate} group by date_format(complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date_format(complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')

select date_format(cancel_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, count(1) as totalCount from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and order_status = '4' and cancel_time is not null and cancel_time >= #{startDate} and cancel_time < #{endDate} group by date_format(cancel_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date_format(cancel_time, '%Y-%m-%d')

select date_format(pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, count(1) as paymentCount, coalesce(sum(coalesce(payment_amount, trade_price)), 0) as paymentAmount from tr_trade_order where del_flag = '0' and payment_status = '2' and pay_time is not null and pay_time >= #{startDate} and pay_time < #{endDate} group by date_format(pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date_format(pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d')
where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' for update
mapper.update:
update tr_trade_order
order_status = #{orderStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), confirm_time = #{confirmTime}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, pay_time = #{payTime},
where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0'

update tr_trade_order set payment_status = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '0' and payment_status in ('0', '1', '3') and del_flag = '0'

update tr_trade_order set order_status = #{orderStatus}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '0' and (payment_status is null or payment_status not in ('1', '2')) and del_flag = '0'

update tr_trade_order set order_status = '2', payment_status = '2', alipay_trade_no = #{alipayTradeNo}, payment_amount = #{paymentAmount}, pay_time = #{payTime}, payment_time = #{payTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '0' and payment_status in ('0', '1') and del_flag = '0'
update tr_trade_order set payment_status = '3', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '0' and payment_status in ('0', '1') and del_flag = '0'

update tr_trade_order set order_status = '6', refund_status = '1', refund_reason = #{refundReason}, refund_apply_time = #{applyTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '2' and refund_status = '0' and del_flag = '0'
update tr_trade_order set refund_status = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '6' and refund_status = '1' and del_flag = '0'

update tr_trade_order set order_status = '2', refund_status = '4', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '6' and refund_status = '1' and del_flag = '0'

update tr_trade_order set order_status = '6', refund_status = '2', refund_reason = #{refundReason}, refund_apply_time = #{applyTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '2' and refund_status = '0' and del_flag = '0'
update tr_trade_order set order_status = '5', update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' and (order_status = '3' or (order_status = '2' and refund_status = '4'))

update tr_trade_order set order_status = '7', refund_status = '3', payment_status = '4', alipay_refund_no = #{alipayRefundNo}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, refund_time = #{refundTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '5' and del_flag = '0'

update tr_trade_order set order_status = '7', refund_status = '3', payment_status = '4', alipay_refund_no = #{alipayRefundNo}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, refund_time = #{refundTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId} and order_status = '6' and refund_status = '2' and del_flag = '0'
